name: folio-web
description: Monaco Editor bundle for Folio's Tauri shell.

scripts.build: node copy-monaco.js && esbuild editor.ts --bundle --format=iife --target=es2018 --platform=browser --outfile=../dist/editor.bundle.js --minify --legal-comments=none && esbuild app/main.ts --bundle --format=iife --target=es2018 --platform=browser --outfile=../dist/app.bundle.js --minify --legal-comments=none && esbuild styles/index.css --bundle --outfile=../dist/app.css --minify
